injuries.comment: Head coach Paul Maurice said Monday that he expects Gadjovich (upper body) to miss at least a week, George Richards of Florida Hockey Now reports.
The Panthers said that Marchand is OUT for Tuesday's (Oct. 28) game versus the Ducks, according to Jordan McPherson of the Miami Herald.
Kreider did not play in Saturday's (Oct. 25) game against the Lightning.
Gudas did not play in Saturday's (Oct. 25) game against the Lightning.
The Ducks said that Granlund Mikael Granlund is considered week-to-week with a lower-body injury.
